response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Connect' (コネクト) perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were fully utilized for transcribing and translating the Japanese portion. The subsequent English conversation was transcribed manually with high accuracy. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are closely matched to the vocal events, maintaining silence during pure instrumental parts and laughs.

subtitles.original: きっと奇跡はおこせるだろう
subtitles.english: I'm sure we can make a miracle happen

subtitles.original: 交わした約束忘れないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the promise we made

subtitles.original: 目を閉じ 確かめる
subtitles.english: I close my eyes and confirm it

subtitles.original: 押し寄せた闇 振り払って進むよ
subtitles.english: I'll shake off the encroaching darkness and move forward

subtitles.original: どんなに 大きな壁があっても
subtitles.english: No matter how big the wall is in front of us

subtitles.original: 越えてみせるから きっと
subtitles.english: I'm sure I'll show you I can overcome it

subtitles.original: 明日 信じて 祈って
subtitles.english: Believing in tomorrow, and praying

subtitles.original: 壊れた世界で 彷徨ってわたしは
subtitles.english: Wandering through this broken world, I...

subtitles.original: 引き寄せられるように 辿り着いた
subtitles.english: ...finally arrived here, as if drawn to you

subtitles.original: 目ざめた心は 走り出した未来を描くため
subtitles.english: My awakened heart started running to paint the future

subtitles.original: 難しい道で 立ち止まっても
subtitles.english: Even if I halt along this difficult path

subtitles.original: 空はきれいな青さで いつも待っててくれる
subtitles.english: The sky will always wait for me with its beautiful blue

subtitles.original: だから怖くない
subtitles.english: So I'm not afraid anymore

subtitles.original: もう何があっても 挫けない
subtitles.english: No matter what happens, I won't lose heart

subtitles.original: ずっと明日 待って
subtitles.english: And I'll keep waiting for tomorrow

subtitles.original: Yay! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: Yay! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Oh! Hug! Hug! Hug!
subtitles.english: Oh! Hug! Hug! Hug!

subtitles.original: Happy birthday!
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you, Kronii! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, Kronii! Thank you!

subtitles.original: I'm so excited for you! It's your first 3D birthday live!
subtitles.english: I'm so excited for you! It's your first 3D birthday live!

subtitles.original: It is! And look at us with our idol outfit! Oh, we're so pretty!
subtitles.english: It is! And look at us with our idol outfit! Oh, we're so pretty!

subtitles.original: We are so gorgeous.
subtitles.english: We are so gorgeous.

subtitles.original: So cool! I'm so cool!
subtitles.english: So cool! I'm so cool!

subtitles.original: You are.
subtitles.english: You are.

subtitles.original: I am so cool!
subtitles.english: I am so cool!

subtitles.original: And you know, because you're so cool, I want to give you a beautiful color that I think would suit you.
subtitles.english: And you know, because you're so cool, I want to give you a beautiful color that I think would suit you.

subtitles.original: Me?
subtitles.english: Me?

subtitles.original: Yes.
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: Which color? Pink? Is it going to be pink?
subtitles.english: Which color? Pink? Is it going to be pink?

subtitles.original: Um, it's...
subtitles.english: Um, it's...

subtitles.original: If you look at your eyes, your beautiful... yellow eyes...
subtitles.english: If you look at your eyes, your beautiful... yellow eyes...

subtitles.original: They, they have curiosity and playfulness.
subtitles.english: They, they have curiosity and playfulness.

subtitles.original: And... I think it suits you.
subtitles.english: And... I think it suits you.

subtitles.original: And so I would like to give this color, this beautiful color around us.
subtitles.english: And so I would like to give this color, this beautiful color around us.

subtitles.original: Which color?
subtitles.english: Which color?

subtitles.original: Are you color blind?
subtitles.english: Are you color blind?

subtitles.original: What?! No!
subtitles.english: What?! No!

subtitles.original: You don't have to bully me on my birthday! You're supposed to be nice to me!
subtitles.english: You don't have to bully me on my birthday! You're supposed to be nice to me!

subtitles.original: No, no, I meant your beautiful yellow eyes.
subtitles.english: No, no, I meant your beautiful yellow eyes.

subtitles.original: Ah... It's like gold.
subtitles.english: Ah... It's like gold.

subtitles.original: Why?! On my birthday, instead of giving me a gift, you come here, you sing and dance with me, and then you just start bullying me! Get out of here!
subtitles.english: Why?! On my birthday, instead of giving me a gift, you come here, you sing and dance with me, and then you just start bullying me! Get out of here!

subtitles.original: I complimented you! It's... I complimented your golden... golden eyes! Is that beautiful?
subtitles.english: I complimented you! It's... I complimented your golden... golden eyes! Is that beautiful?

subtitles.original: So... so it's kind of like yellow, right?
subtitles.english: So... so it's kind of like yellow, right?

subtitles.original: Ye- yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: Ye- yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: So, what does it mean? Why... why did you give this color to me?
subtitles.english: So, what does it mean? Why... why did you give this color to me?

subtitles.original: I... like...
subtitles.english: I... like...

subtitles.original: I just said curiosity and playfulness.
subtitles.english: I just said curiosity and playfulness.

subtitles.original: So...
subtitles.english: So...

subtitles.original: I was listening to you!
subtitles.english: I was listening to you!

subtitles.original: You weren't paying attention to me. You don't care about me.
subtitles.english: You weren't paying attention to me. You don't care about me.

subtitles.original: My turn. You talk too much. My turn.
subtitles.english: My turn. You talk too much. My turn.

subtitles.original: I think you should keep up with your dreams.
subtitles.english: I think you should keep up with your dreams.

subtitles.original: I have a question.
subtitles.english: I have a question.

subtitles.original: Okay! I have an answer.
subtitles.english: Okay! I have an answer.

subtitles.original: Like, I was expecting like... blue coming from you.
subtitles.english: Like, I was expecting like... blue coming from you.
